div.div:
Checklist (plugin B, e.g. downloads)
1. plugins/downloads/ — contract, token, web/index.ts (install + provide)
2. buildTargetVirtuals — if (id === "virtual:downloads") → …
3. env.d.ts — declare module "virtual:downloads"
4. plugin-registry — import virtual:downloads, call installDownloads(app)
5. UI — key from plugins/downloads/token.ts, inject

Legend
Solid arrows: control / data flow. Dashed: build-time link to bundled module.
